WILLIAM RAUCH, JUDGE PRO TEM; KPEEK, CLERK; BYEE, REPORTER. MICHAEL ROSSOFF, ESQ FOR PLTF; MONIQUICA HATCH, IN PRO PER. MATTER IS ASSIGNED FROM D-206 TO RM 503B FOR PRE-TRIAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT IS REACHED IN FAVOR OF PLTF. DEFT TO PAY $1,000 TO PLTF BY THE EVENING OF 10/19/01. STIPULATED PAYMENTS FOR BACK RENT/COSTS TO BE PAID MONTHLY FROM 11/1/01 THROUGH 10/31/02. IF DEFT PAYS ALL RENTS/PAYMENTS DUE TIMELY, PLTF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PLTF WILL NOT BE ENTITLED TO ANY STAYS OR APPEALS. STIPULATED AGREEMENT IS SIGNED THIS DATE AND A DUPLICATE ORIGINAL PROVIDED TO DEFT.
